chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt. Petition No. S- 180 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution. 24.07.2025. Mr. Aftab Nek Muhammad Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. ------------ None present for the petitioners. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. This Constitutional Petition has been filed for protection allegedly caused by official respondents at the behest of private respondents. Record reflects that this petition was filed on 05.06.2025, thereafter Petitioners and their Counsel did not bother to deposit cost or pursue this matter which prima facie suggests that either the grievance of the petitioners have been served or the Petitioners have lost interest to pursue the matter. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E S.Ashfaq
